nodes.label: Client-Ready Build Plan
nodes.summary: Phased build plan for Grid Control: Phase 1 (Supabase+Auth+Onboarding+SSE+Deploy), Phase 2 (Stripe billing+Langfuse+Revision loop+Team roles), Phase 3 (LangGraph+White-labeling+No-code agent config). Safe word GRIDLOCK-BUILD-27MAY.

nodes.label: Eval Harness (Rule 9)
nodes.summary: Formalizes Rule 9 AutoResearch with capability evals, regression evals, grader types (code-based, model-based, human), and pass@k metrics. Runner at tests/evals/runner.py (TODO).

nodes.label: Subagent Orchestration Patterns
nodes.summary: Defines when to delegate to sub-agents vs inline execution. Iterative retrieval pattern: decompose->spawn->aggregate->verify->decide. Token savings ~96%. Future CEOBrain.dispatch_subtask() helper planned.

nodes.label: Jarvis Voice Config
nodes.summary: OpenJarvis config for Grid Control voice assistant. Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 as brain, edge-tts with en-US-GuyNeural voice, wake word 'hey jarvis'.

nodes.label: CEO Brain Prompt
nodes.summary: Master orchestrator prompt. 5 responsibilities: routing, quality gate, contradiction detection, pipeline management, standup generation. Defines routing pipeline order and contradiction signals.

nodes.label: Strategy Agent Prompt
nodes.summary: 90-day growth roadmap agent. 3 variants: aggressive growth, trust-first slow burn, hybrid with phase gates. Metric: highest probability of 10 paying beta clients in 90 days.

nodes.label: Content Planner Prompt
nodes.summary: 30-day content calendar agent. 3 variants: education-heavy, social proof-heavy, curiosity/hook-heavy. Produces specific posts with platform, format, topic, hook, CTA.

nodes.label: Script Writer Prompt
nodes.summary: Production-ready script agent. 3 hook variants: pain-first, result-first, curiosity/pattern interrupt. Enforces brand voice check and AI flag word ban.

nodes.label: Brand Guardian Prompt
nodes.summary: Brand soul protector. Defines brand soul, unique tension, contrarian directive, voice consistency. Runs voice audits, audience language capture, failed content autopsies.

nodes.label: Ad Strategist Prompt
nodes.summary: Paid ads agent activated ONLY when budget confirmed. Scrapes Meta Ad Library, builds creative pattern maps. 3 variants: proven angle, gap angle, direct response. A/B test structure with kill/scale thresholds.

nodes.label: Data Analyst Prompt
nodes.summary: Read-only metrics agent. Pulls IG/LinkedIn data, scores content, detects anomalies. 3 variants: raw metrics, trend+pattern, actionable insight. Flags bot-like spikes and dormant agents.

nodes.label: Funnel Specialist Prompt
nodes.summary: Conversion journey designer. 3 funnel variants: awareness-first (cold), retargeting (warm), hybrid with split entry points. DM scripts, landing page copy, post-purchase sequences.

nodes.label: Website Agent Prompt
nodes.summary: Brand website builder. 3 layout variants: conversion-optimized, trust-optimized, story-led. Deploys to Railway. GA4+Search Console tracking. Same dark premium visual direction.

nodes.label: SEO+AEO Agent Prompt
nodes.summary: Dual-track SEO (Google rankings) + AEO (AI citation optimization for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overview). Schema markup, entity building, content gap analysis.

nodes.label: Community Manager Prompt
nodes.summary: IG/LinkedIn comment/DM management. 5 reply categories: genuine engagement, simple acknowledgment, sales inquiry, criticism, spam. Max 30 actions/hour. Gaurav's personal voice.

nodes.label: Supabase Schema (Multi-Tenant)
nodes.summary: 9 tables with RLS: profiles, brands, brand_members (admin/editor/viewer roles), agent_runs (with cost tracking), agent_outputs (approval workflow), conversations, session_state, audit_log, brand_memory (pgvector 1536-dim). RLS helpers: is_brand_member(), is_brand_admin().

nodes.label: profiles table
nodes.summary: Mirrors auth.users. Fields: id, email, full_name, avatar_url, is_super_admin. Auto-created via trigger on auth.users insert.

nodes.label: brands table
nodes.summary: Brand entity: id, slug (unique), name, profile (jsonb), created_at. RLS scoped to brand_members.

nodes.label: brand_members table
nodes.summary: User-to-brand mapping with role (admin/editor/viewer). Unique constraint on (brand_id, user_id). Core of multi-tenant access control.

nodes.label: agent_runs table
nodes.summary: Tracks each agent execution: brand_id, agent_slug, status, loop_header, timestamps, model, token counts, cost breakdowns (api/fal/apify).

nodes.label: agent_outputs table
nodes.summary: Agent output storage with approval workflow: raw_output, formatted_output, approval_status (pending/approved/rejected), approved_at.

nodes.label: brand_memory table
nodes.summary: Per-brand per-agent memory with pgvector embeddings (1536-dim). Keys: brand_id, agent_slug, memory_key. Enables semantic search over agent learnings.

nodes.label: RLS Multi-Tenant Isolation
nodes.summary: Row Level Security on all 9 Supabase tables. is_brand_member() and is_brand_admin() helper functions. Service role bypasses RLS for Flask backend. Client A cannot see Client B data.

nodes.label: Agent Pipeline Routing
nodes.summary: Sequential pipeline: Trend Researcher -> Strategy Agent -> Content Planner -> Script Writer -> Creative Director. Brand Guardian and Data Analyst run after pipeline. Ad Strategist only on confirmed budget.

nodes.label: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
nodes.summary: Getting cited as the answer in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overview, Gemini. Requires entity building, FAQ schema, structured content, authority signals.

nodes.label: DOJO AI (Competitor)
nodes.summary: Closest competitor. $499/mo, $6M raised, 100+ brands. DOJO Graph digital twin, real-time paid/organic monitoring, autonomous content generation. Claims 40% lower CAC.

nodes.label: Jasper AI (Competitor)
nodes.summary: Medium threat. $59/mo Pro tier. 100+ AI agents, Content Pipelines, Jasper Studio no-code builder. Content-first, not orchestration-first.
